note: AI Engine page advanced to v0.16.0. Two new SHIPPED milestones: M15 (Console Persistence + Operator Workflow) covers SQLite chat persistence, full safe action wiring (review_pack/outcome/daemon/operator/learning/dossiers/campaigns), report browser 2.0 with strict path safety, UI polish (CHATS sidebar/+NEW/EXPORT/CLEAR/creativity selector/spinner/modal), and the provider-status panel that surfaces only booleans (paid_locked: true). M16 (Speculative Discovery Lab) replaces the M14 'ideate' generic-text behaviour with a real ideation engine: 6 domain generators (membrane/catalyst/photovoltaic/ion_separation/geaspirit-theory/heavy_task) with mechanism + falsifier + validation path per idea, 5 creativity dials, self-critic, M10 learning bias, canonical six-file output folder under reports/ai_engine/ideas/. DFT priority prompt now returns either a ranked candidate table from M11/M12 or an explicit 'no candidate found' answer. Tests 1,152/1,152. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
